content: CFTC COT data for E-mini S&P 500: CFTC Code 13874A, full name 'E-MINI S&P 500 - CHICAGO MERCANTILE EXCHANGE'. Consolidated ticker is 13874+ (combines standard SPX + e-mini + micro). Best Python lib: cot_reports (PyPI: cot-reports v0.1.3, Dec 2023, no auth required, downloads directly from CFTC CSV bulk files). Functions: cot_hist(cot_report_type), cot_year(year, cot_report_type), cot_all(cot_report_type). Returns pandas DataFrame. Filter: df[df['Market and Exchange Names']=='E-MINI S&P 500 - CHICAGO MERCANTILE EXCHANGE']. Best report type for equity futures positioning: 'traders_in_financial_futures_fut' (TFF) which breaks down Dealers/Asset Managers/Leveraged Funds/Other -- Leveraged Funds position is the key signal for SPX options traders (trend-following hedge funds). Legacy report ('legacy_fut') gives Commercial vs Non-Commercial breakdown (simpler). CFTC also has Socrata API at publicreporting.cftc.gov -- no auth required, dataset ID for TFF futures-only is gpe5-46if, legacy futures-only is 6dca-aqww. Data released Fridays 3:30pm ET with Tuesday close lag. Weekly cadence. Use sodapy or direct HTTPS requests to Socrata endpoint.
